name: gate-v1
structure: public dev split (self-score) + private gate split (scores the crown, rotated each round) — same suite mix, generators, and grading on both; only the seed differs

suites.description: sequence extrapolation — find the next term of a second-order recurrence (aₙ = aₙ₋₁·r + d·n), multiple choice
multi-step quantitative word problems (inventory arithmetic), free-form numeric answer
predict the output of a short Python program — nested loops with a conditional, multiple choice
total-order constraint puzzles (“who is tallest?” from shuffled pairwise facts), multiple choice
gcd / lcm / modular exponentiation, free-form numeric answer
general-knowledge MCQ drawn as a secret per-round subset of a published question pool
